Results for 'top attractions and restaurants in Almere' in Almere, Netherlands:
1. Almira - Steak and cocktails Almere [Restaurant] ⭐ 4.7 (357 reviews) | €40–80
   🕐 Open · Closes 11 PM
   📍 Grote Markt 53-55, 1315 JC Almere, Netherlands
   "Best food in Almere so far!"
2. Almere Underground - Family Entertainment Center [Restaurant] ⭐ 4.7 (1218 reviews)
   🕐 Open · Closes 11 PM
   📍 Schippergarage 7, 1315 SC Almere, Netherlands
   "Good ambience, lot of activities, at the heart of Almere."
3. Stadslandgoed de Kemphaan [Tourist attraction] ⭐ 4.5 (989 reviews)
   🕐 Open 24 hours
   📍 Kemphaanpad 4, 1358 AC Almere, Netherlands
   "We live in Almere for almost a decade."
4. BOUTIQ [Restaurant] ⭐ 4.4 (444 reviews) | €20–70
   🕐 Open · Closes 12 AM
   📍 Grote Markt 3, 1315 JA Almere, Netherlands
   "If you’re in Almere, this place is a must-visit."
5. Restaurant Dunes [Restaurant] ⭐ 4.3 (372 reviews) | €20–60
   🕐 Open · Closes 11 PM
   📍 Zeeduinweg 201, 1361 BG Almere, Netherlands
   "I am super happy to see new restaurants in Almere Poort!"
